comment:
My husband is a veteran, and we proudly support veteran owned companies.  When I was interested in raising the canopy and getting tree limbs cleared, I searched for a local, veteran owned company and came across Evelin and Mean Green Lawn and Landscape.

Working with Evelin was wonderful - she answered all of my questions, came out to look at the yard, had her arborist come and evaluate some trees, and then sent a really reasonable quote.

When we were ready to go forward with the work, we were able to get scheduled quickly.

The crew that came out was really friendly, answered all my questions (since this was my first time getting this kind of work done), worked quickly and carefully and cleaned up really well.  In just a few hours our yard and front of our house was transformed!

I would highly recommend working with Mean Green Lawn and Landscape.  I'll be a returning customer for other services they offer.

Thanks Mean Green!
draft_response: Katie, thank you. Hearing that the lawn care service delivered the results you expected confirms we are doing our job right. We look forward to continuing to serve your property.
